name: M-96
events: 14 Aug 1942 M-96 fires a torpedo against the German auxiliary patrol vessel Helene south-west of Porkkala, Finland. The torpedo misses its target.
11 Nov 1942 While on patrol in the Gulf of Finland M-96 fires a torpedo against a ship that is identified as a auxiliary patrol vessel. The torpedo misses its target.
12 Nov 1942 While on patrol in the Gulf of Finland M-96 fires a torpedo against a ship that is identified as a merchant. The torpedo misses its target.
